dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Here is what's happening with your job search today
dashboard.profileCompletionDesc: Update your information to increase your chances of being noticed by employers
dashboard.recommendedDesc: Based on your profile and preferences
dashboard.skillGapDesc: Skills you need to improve for your target position

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information to increase your job opportunities
profile.loginRequired: Please log in to view your profile
profile.completionDesc: A complete profile increases your chances of being noticed by employers
profile.repoModalDesc: Gemini AI will analyze the code and automatically update skills in your profile
profile.linkedinModalDesc: Enter your LinkedIn data to sync your profile
profile.linkedinPlaceholderModal: Paste your LinkedIn data here (JSON format or profile URL)
profile.toastAnalyzeFailed: Unable to start analysis. Please try again.
profile.toastOAuthFailed: Unable to create GitHub OAuth URL. Please try again.

cvList.title: Manage CVs
cvList.subtitle: Manage all your CVs in one place
cvList.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop your CV here
cvList.dropzoneSelect: choose a file from your computer
cvList.emptyDesc: Upload your first CV to start applying for exciting job opportunities
cvList.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this CV?
cvList.toastUploadFailed: CV upload failed. Please try again.
cvList.toastDeleteFailed: CV deletion failed. Please try again.
cvList.toastInvalidFile: Please select a PDF or Word file (.doc, .docx)

aiCV.title: AI CV Assistant
aiCV.subtitle: AI technology helps your CV stand out and attract employers
aiCV.feature1Desc: Create a professional CV in minutes with a smart AI assistant
aiCV.feature2Desc: Evaluate strengths, weaknesses and receive improvement suggestions
aiCV.feature3Desc: Automatically optimize your CV to pass ATS filtering systems
aiCV.feature4Desc: Chat with AI advisor to receive detailed CV feedback
aiCV.comingSoonDesc: We are building advanced AI tools to help you create and optimize your CV. Check back soon to experience new features!
aiCV.ctaDesc: While waiting, you can manage your existing CVs
aiCV.notifyTitle: Want to be notified when the AI CV feature launches?
aiCV.notifyDesc: Notifications will be automatically sent to your registered email

applicationHistory.title: Application history
applicationHistory.subtitle: Track and manage your job applications
applicationHistory.emptyNoApplication: You haven't applied to any jobs yet.
applicationHistory.emptyNoMatch: No applications found for this status.
applicationHistory.msgNextRound: Congratulations, you've moved to the next round!
applicationHistory.msgAccepted: Congratulations, your application has been accepted!
applicationHistory.msgRejected: Your profile doesn't match this position
applicationHistory.modalDesc: Are you sure you want to withdraw your application? This action cannot be undone.
applicationHistory.toastWithdrawFailed: Unable to withdraw. Please try again.
applicationHistory.loadError: Failed to load applications. Please try again.

savedJobs.title: Saved jobs
savedJobs.subtitle: A list of job postings you have saved to view later.
savedJobs.emptyDesc: Click the save icon on any job posting to add it to this list.
